summary: Added the hand-authored local JSONL scan-history store, shared scan helpers, and absorbed commands (check, report, advice, guide), wired into root.go.
reason: The upstream API is a stateless single POST with no list endpoint, so the generator emits no store; the scan-history layer plus friendly scan and fix-advice commands are hand-authored on top of the one generated endpoint.
validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet, go test -race, and full live dogfood pass.
